titleStmt.title: SII 39.263: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 263. (A.R. No. 263 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. BHŪVARAGAHAVA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL. VIJAYANAGARA: SRIRAṄGADĒVA MAHĀRĀYA, ŚAKA 1505 (1583 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription registers the gift of two villages viz., Saṉṉānattam and Kīḻāvuḍaiya nattam in Ālambāḍipaṟṟu of Buvanēgaviraṉ paṭṭanam to Rāyasam Veṅkāṭayar, son of Kōnamarasaiyar, a servant of Koṇḍama Nāyaka, for food offerings, lamps and maintening garden in the temple of Ādivarāha perumāḷ. The gift was made by Koṇḍama-nāyakkar along with the nāṭṭavar of Paṭṭaṇa-sīrmai and Eṭṭu-paṟṟu-sīrmai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī manmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran śrīraṅkadeva mahārāyar pradhivirājyam paṇṇi Aru
ḷā niṉṟa cakābdam 1000 5 100 5 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa citrabhānu varuṣam vaikāci mātam
10 3 § kāṟtikaiyum Amāvāciyum peṟṟa canivārattu nāḷ vaiyyappa kiṣṇappanāyakkar kumā
ra koṇḍama nāyakkar Ayyaṉum paṭṭaṇaccīrmai ṉāṭṭava Āt nayiṉār Eṭṭuppaṟṟu ṉāṭṭava
rum koṇṭama nāyakkar vācalil Irukkum konamaracayyar puttirar Irāyasam veṅ
kaṭayar Avarkaḷukku kuṭutta dharmmasātana paṭṭayam naṭuviṉ maṇṭalam vaḻutalam pa
ṭṭu cāvaṭi veḷḷāṟṟukku vaṭakku puvaṉekaviraṉ paṭṭaṇam Ālampāṭi paṟṟil centa caṉṉānattam
tiḷāvuṭaiyā nattam Inta Iraṇḍu kiṟāmmum caṅkiṟama puṇṇiya kālattile tārai vāttuk kuṭut
tom Inta Iraṇṭu kiṟāmattukku nilam ṉālām teṟṟukkum Aḻikkuṭi Ellaikkum meṟku veḷ
ḷāṟṟaṅkaraikku vaṭakku vattirāyateṟṟu Ellaikku kiḻakku Uṭaiūr Ellaikkum cīyappāṭi Ellai
kkum teṟku Inta nāṉkellaiyum Uḷpaṭa tirumuṭṭam Ātivarākap perumāḷukku Irāyasam veṅkaṭa
yar ṉaivettiyattum neyviḷakkum tirunantavaṉattukkum tārāpūṟuvammāka tārai vārttu kuṭuttapaṭi
Inta taṉmattai paripālaṉam paṇṇiṉaper geṅkai karaiyile kārām pacuvai taṉmampaṇṇiṉa palaṉ peṟuvār
Intat taṉmakku Akutam paṇṇiṉaper keṅkai karaiyile kārām pacuvai koṉṟa toṣattile povārāka §
Digital edition of SII 39.263 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
